name: ffb-tracker
description: Draft-tracker web app (Cloudflare Worker) consuming ffb board.json v1

scripts.publish:board: wrangler kv key put --binding BOARD board:current --path ../exports/board.json --local --preview
scripts.publish:board:remote: wrangler kv key put --binding BOARD board:current --path ../exports/board.json --remote --preview false
